tasks_completed.notes: orders and order_items tables. Auto-generated order_number (ORD-YYYYMMDD-XXXXXX).
Users see own orders by email. Admins manage all. Guest checkout supported.
GET /api/orders (list by email or order_number), PATCH for admin status updates.
payment_method enum includes 'pay_on_delivery'. Default in checkout.

notes_for_next_agent.gamma: Orders API ready. Customer can view orders by email param. Order confirmation shows order_number. Admin can update status via PATCH /api/orders/[id]/status.
